dialog.body: Eight distinct patent families surface in Google Patents inventor search for Thomas Spencer McCarthy-Howe, spanning TEN DIGIT Communications, Virtual Hold Technology Solutions, and Strolid assignees. Public speaker bios reference approximately fifteen patents; the difference from eight likely reflects international counterparts (US, WO, EP, CN, CA) and continuations counted separately.

meta.notes: The eight families covered in vcons/patents/ span contact-center messaging (intermediary device family), cloud callback and conversation platforms, mobile callback prioritization, and proxy-based mobile communications. Earlier-career filings at PictureTel, Polycom, Aware, Versatel, and Comverse (under the 'Thomas Howe' byline) are not surfaced by the current Google Patents inventor search and would need a separate lookup if in scope.
